hooks.command: echo 'Default workflow: before making changes, perform repo-audit. For non-trivial work, also use implementation-plan. If the task involves external APIs, use api-check first. If the task involves dashboards, Google Sheets, multi-tab UI, or formatting changes, use dashboard-qa. If the task involves editing existing code without changing intended behavior, use safe-refactor.'
echo 'Reminder after compaction: use repo-audit before changes, implementation-plan for non-trivial work, api-check for APIs, dashboard-qa for dashboards/sheets/UI, and safe-refactor for refactors.'

echo 'Before proceeding: follow the default workflow. Start with repo-audit before code changes. Use implementation-plan for non-trivial work. Use api-check for APIs. Use dashboard-qa for dashboards, sheets, formatting, tabs, or views. Use safe-refactor for existing code changes.'
